items.title: T1059 — Command & Scripting Interpreter
items.detail: Building Wazuh rules to detect suspicious PowerShell and Bash execution chains from parent processes like winword.exe and mshta.exe.

items.title: Elastic Stack (ELK)
items.detail: Learning Elasticsearch queries and Kibana dashboards as a complementary SIEM alongside Wazuh for multi-source log correlation.

items.title: CompTIA CySA+ preparation
items.detail: Studying for CySA+ to formalise threat detection, vulnerability management, and incident response knowledge.

items.title: Kubernetes Security Monitoring
items.detail: Adding K8s audit log ingestion to the home SOC lab — container telemetry and runtime anomaly detection with Falco.
